# guardrails denylist — one term per line, comments start with #
#
# Add credential NAMES or private infrastructure terms your team never wants
# to appear in this repo. The guardrails CI fails any commit containing them.
# Names only — never put a credential VALUE here or anywhere else in the repo.
#
# Example (uncomment and replace):
# my-company-read-token
# MY_DEPLOY_SECRET
